---
title: "HoTTRijke Documentation Index"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Documentation Pages


- [Chapter 3 HTML](chapter3_documentation.html)
- [Chapter 4 HTML](chapter4_documentation.html)
- [Chapter 5 Equality HTML](chapter5_eq_documentation.html)
- [Chapter 5 Integers HTML](chapter5_ints_documentation.html)
